authorizeGroupKey(uint256,uint256).details: Call this after a successful DKG ceremony.  Only the owner may      authorize keys, preventing rogue DKG substitution attacks.

params.ttlSeconds: How long (in seconds) this option can be settled.                        Pass 0 for no expiry (not recommended in production).

params.pk_x: x-coordinate of the group verifying key.
params.pk_y: y-coordinate of the group verifying key.
params.sig_R_x: x-coordinate of the nonce commitment R (even-y convention).

returns.valid: true iff the signature is valid.

authorizeGroupKey(uint256,uint256).notice: Register an authorized DKG group key.

isGroupKeyAuthorized(uint256,uint256).notice: Check whether a group key is currently authorized.

revokeGroupKey(uint256,uint256).notice: Revoke an authorized group key (e.g. after a key rotation).

settle(bytes32,(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32,.notice: Settle a binary option (Payout phase). Fix: replaced winner.transfer(amount) with a low-level call. transfer() forwards only 2,300 gas (EIP-150 stipend), which is not enough for contract recipients after EIP-1884 raised SLOAD to 2,100. Low-level call forwards all available gas and reverts on failure.

verify(bytes32,uint256,uint256,uint256,u.notice: Verify a FROST Schnorr aggregate signature.

verifyAttestation((bytes32,bytes32,bytes.notice: SC.Verify(σ, pk) — Verify a Π_coll-min attestation. Checks (in order):   1. statementDigest is non-zero.   2. threshold is at least 1.   3. threshold ≤ verifierCount.   4. Group key is in the authorized registry.  [new]   5. FROST Schnorr signature is valid.
